title: arctotis × fastulacea
intro: Arctotis × fastulacea, also known as the African daisy or Cape daisy, is a hybrid perennial flower native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow and orange daisy-like blooms. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Arctotis × fastulacea include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its numerous health benefits.
